tasks.subject: Phase 1: Inventory all backup targets (volumes, bind mounts, sizes) and assign P0–P3 tiers
Phase 1: Define target RPO/RTO for parquet, Postgres, and full stack restore
Phase 2: Design on-server archive layout and manifest.json schema
Phase 2: Implement bin/backup-sawtooth (pg_dump + parquet archive + bind mounts + manifest)
Phase 2: Schedule periodic backups and on-server retention policy
Phase 3: Evaluate off-site options (cloud, encrypted media, private repo) and pick primary destination
tasks.note: Operator input required for credentials, billing, physical media

tasks.subject: Phase 3: Implement encrypted off-site transfer and remote manifest verification
Phase 4: Write DR runbook (empty volumes → restore → compose up → DM reconcile → smoke tests)
Phase 4: Execute first DR drill and record actual RTO and gaps (session report)
Phase 5: Optimize backup/restore from drill findings; align WUT ActiveAccountsBackupJob with ecosystem policy
